targets.expr: topk(12, sum by (namespace, deployment) (kube_deployment_status_replicas_available{namespace=~"$namespace"}) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace, deployment) (kube_deployment_spec_replicas{namespace=~"$namespace"}), 1))
sum by (namespace) (kube_pod_status_ready{namespace=~"$namespace",condition="false"}) or on(namespace) (0 * sum by (namespace) (kube_deployment_spec_replicas{namespace=~"$namespace"}))

sum by (namespace) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace=~"$namespace",container!="",container!="POD",pod!=""}[30m])) or on(namespace) (0 * sum by (namespace) (kube_deployment_spec_replicas{namespace=~"$namespace"}))

sum by (namespace) (kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_reason{namespace=~"$namespace",reason="OOMKilled",container!="",pod!=""}) or on(namespace) (0 * sum by (namespace) (kube_deployment_spec_replicas{namespace=~"$namespace"}))

topk(10, sum by (namespace, pod, container) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace",container!="",container!="POD",pod!="",image!=""}) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace, pod, container) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace",resource="memory",unit="byte",container!=""}), 1))

topk(10, sum by (namespace, pod, container) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace",container!="",container!="POD",pod!="",image!=""}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace, pod, container) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace=~"$namespace",container!="",container!="POD",pod!="",image!=""}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001))
